key.name: audio-backend
key.description: Audio capture backend: gstreamer (built-in) or cava (external)

key.name: bar-count
key.description: The number of visualizer bars to display

key.name: bar-color
key.description: Color of the visualizer bars in CSS format

key.name: use-gradient
key.description: Alternate between two colors to create a gradient effect

key.name: gradient-color
key.description: Second color for gradient effect in CSS format

key.name: max-height
key.description: Maximum height of the bars in pixels

key.name: hide-when-silent
key.description: Hide the visualizer when there is no audio playback

key.name: sensitivity
key.description: Audio sensitivity/gain level

key.name: framerate
key.description: Frames per second for CAVA output

key.name: alpha-rise
key.description: Exponential smoothing coefficient when bars are increasing (0.05–1.0)

key.name: alpha-fall
key.description: Exponential smoothing coefficient when bars are decreasing (0.5–1.0)

key.name: noise-floor
key.description: Amplitude below which a frame is treated as silence

key.name: silence-zero-frames
key.description: Number of consecutive silent frames before snapping bars to baseline

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Position in the top panel: left, center, or right

key.name: position-index
key.description: Order relative to other elements in the panel

key.name: bottom-padding
key.description: Padding from the bottom of the panel in pixels

key.name: show-pill-background
key.description: Show a rounded pill background behind the visualizer

key.name: pill-color
key.description: Color of the pill background in CSS format

key.name: visualization-mode
key.description: Display mode: bars, led-bars, vu-meter, or pulse

key.name: meter-size
key.description: Pixel width of each VU meter gauge

key.name: needle-color
key.description: Color of the VU meter needle in CSS format

key.name: meter-bg-color
key.description: Background color of the VU meter face in CSS format

key.name: meter-sensitivity
key.description: Gain multiplier for VU meter needle level (0.5–5.0)

key.name: use-vertical-gradient
key.description: Apply a vertical gradient within each bar from bottom color to top color

key.name: vertical-gradient-color
key.description: Top color for vertical gradient within each bar in CSS format

key.name: led-segment-count
key.description: Number of LED segments per bar

key.name: led-gap
key.description: Gap between LED segments in pixels

key.name: led-color-low
key.description: Color for the lower zone of LED bars

key.name: led-color-mid
key.description: Color for the middle zone of LED bars

key.name: led-color-high
key.description: Color for the high/peak zone of LED bars

key.name: led-mid-threshold
key.description: Fraction of bar height where mid zone starts (0.1–0.9)

key.name: led-high-threshold
key.description: Fraction of bar height where high/peak zone starts (0.1–0.95)

key.name: pulse-bar-count
key.description: Number of bars in Pulse mode

key.name: pulse-color
key.description: Color of the pulse bars in CSS format

key.name: pulse-glow
key.description: Draw a soft glow halo behind each pulse bar

key.name: show-now-playing
key.description: Display track info and album art next to the visualizer

key.name: show-album-art
key.description: Show album art thumbnail in now-playing display

key.name: show-track-title
key.description: Show track title text in now-playing display

key.name: now-playing-max-width
key.description: Maximum width for track title in pixels

key.name: now-playing-position
key.description: Position of now-playing info relative to visualizer: left or right
